productDisplayName: Fila Men's Fuel HI Black Navy Blue Shoe
description: This pair of navy blue high top sneakers from the Fuel-Hi range of fila are designed for utmost comfort and style. Pair them with casual wear like jeans or cargo pants and cool tees and create a stir wherever you go.Upper Navy blue cotton canvas upper with logo graphic on the heel for support and protection White lace-ups for a snug Fit Lightly cushioned insole for greater comfort Midsole Lightweight midsole for cushioning and shock resistance Outsole Durable rubber gum outsole with multi directional grip fila branding on the heel Toe guard for greater protection Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
